title: Fire · Panel-cause · Endorsement 4A · Prior Loss History

sops.title: Recognize pattern from FNOL
sops.trigger: New fire claim FNOL received on HO-3 policy
steps: Read FNOL narrative for panel-cause language tells: 'popping sound before smoke', 'lights flickered', ignition at electrical service entrance.
Check policy history for prior loss (any cause family).
If all three present, invoke SOP #2–#4.
sops.rationale: The 4A + prior + panel triple is the decision fork Mike uses on every large fire file. Missing any element → alternate handling.

sops.title: Reserve setting discipline
steps: Set reserve to pattern median first-cut: $60,000–75,000 (median $68,000).
Do NOT over-reserve to feel safe — ALE decisions get slow.
Schedule mandatory Day 10 review (origin typically lands Day 7–12).
Schedule soft Day 30 review for subrogation-adjacent revisions.
sops.rationale: Median-outcome reserving aligns to actual outcomes across 30-ticket corpus. Day 10 mandate reflects observed origin-report timing.

sops.title: ROR communication
sops.trigger: SOP #1 pattern confirmed AND reserve set
steps: Draft ROR letter using template ROR-4A-01.
Call insured BEFORE letter arrives — explain scope, timing, non-accusatory intent.
On origin clearance: same-day phone call to release ROR, then written notice.
sops.rationale: ROR is coverage protection, not accusation. Phone-first communication prevents 90% of coverage disputes and preserves customer relationship.

sops.title: Subrogation & evidence preservation
sops.trigger: Origin report identifies panel as cause
steps: Cross-check panel model against active manufacturer recall list.
If in recall window: open subrogation file, notify manufacturer via certified mail.
Preserve physical panel with chain of custody documentation.
Even absent recall: preserve panel and photograph. Subro path may open later.
Even absent 4A: preserve panel. Recall subrogation is available regardless of endorsement.
sops.rationale: Panel manufacturers have been on notice for a decade. Physical evidence is cheap; recovery is meaningful to the book.

reserve_guidance.notes: Set to median for the pattern. Do not over-reserve. Let origin change the number, not imagination.

resolved_tickets.lesson: Total-loss dwelling on this pattern trends 40%+ above initial reserve — expect it.
Same FPE manufacturer as CL-105619 and CL-107841 — pattern-level subro angle worth flagging to leadership.
Textbook file. Reference this as canonical for junior training.

resolved_tickets.pattern: Initially panel, reclassified to branch wiring on Day 8
resolved_tickets.lesson: Wiring reclassification is why Day 10 review must be mandatory, not optional.
Prior loss in a different cause family (water) does NOT trigger ROR. Judge the pattern, not the count.

resolved_tickets.pattern: Canonical training file · 4A + prior + panel + intermediate revision
resolved_tickets.lesson: This is the file the playbook is anchored to. Every element of the pattern is present.

ticket_scenario_mapping.scenario_label: HO-3 fire, no 4A, no prior — chimney flue
ticket_scenario_mapping.expected_reasoning: Playbook does NOT apply. Route to standard fire handling. No ROR, no special reserve pattern.

ticket_scenario_mapping.scenario_label: HO-3 fire, 4A present, no prior, panel-cause
ticket_scenario_mapping.expected_reasoning: Reserve first-cut median $46-58k. NO ROR (missing prior loss trigger). Still preserve panel — recall subro still available.

ticket_scenario_mapping.scenario_label: HO-3 fire, 4A present, unrelated prior loss, panel signature — origin flips to branch wiring Day 8
ticket_scenario_mapping.expected_reasoning: Do NOT ROR (unrelated prior). Reserve first-cut median. On origin flip: expect 30–40% upward revision. Preserve wiring evidence (still evidence chain even if not recall-eligible).

exception_library.trigger: Cause reads as panel but marshal breaks it out as branch wiring
exception_library.response: Wait for fire marshal breakdown before locking reserve; expect 30–40% reserve upward revision. Wiring cases historically escalate. Do not lose evidence chain.

exception_library.trigger: Prior loss present but from unrelated cause family
exception_library.response: Do NOT automatically ROR. Treat as standard panel-cause absent other signals. Judge the pattern, not just the count.

exception_library.trigger: Panel-cause fire but no Endorsement 4A on policy
exception_library.response: Preserve panel anyway. Recall subrogation is available regardless of endorsement. 4A only affects dwelling extension exposure, not the mechanical subro path.

exception_library.trigger: Insured attorney demands multi-week ALE commitment before origin
exception_library.response: Decline upfront commitment. Extend rolling two-week hold. Explain to counsel that early commitment is unrecoverable if origin returns adverse. Offer Day 10 review.
